job_title: Data Scientist for Production Staff (CODE : PROD DA)
job_description:
About the role

We are seeking a talented Data Scientist to join our dynamic Production team at PT Panasonic Gobel Energy Indonesia (PECGI) in Cikarang, Bekasi Regency, West Java. As a fulltime employee, you will play a crucial role in driving data-driven decision making and optimising our production processes.
What you'll be doing
Collect, analyse and interpret data from various production systems to identify trends, patterns and opportunities for improvement
Develop and maintain reporting dashboards to provide real-time visibility into production performance
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement data-driven solutions that enhance efficiency and productivity
Assist in the design and development of database structures to support the organisation's data management needs
Provide data-driven recommendations to management to drive strategic decision making
Stay up-to-date with the latest data analysis tools and techniques to continuously improve processes
What we're looking for
D3/S1 Majoring in Data Science, Information Technology, Computer Science, Mathematic or Statistic
Proficient in data analysis tools and techniques, including Phyton, SQL, Excel, and data visualization software
Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills with the ability to interpret data and draw meaningful insights
Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey data-driven insights to stakeholders
Familiarity with production processes and an understanding of manufacturing operations
Attention to detail and a keen interest in continuous improvement

If you are ready to embark on an exciting data-driven journey with us, we encourage you to apply now.

Description
id/x partners provides consulting services specializing in Data, Analytics, and Decisioning solutions. We help organizations leverage data-driven insights, advanced analytics, and modern data platforms to optimize business performance, risk management, and operational efficiency.
As an IT Consultant (Data Scientist / Data Engineer), you will have the opportunity to work on various client projects, helping organizations transform raw data into valuable business insights and scalable data solutions. You will collaborate with multidisciplinary teams to solve complex business challenges through data engineering, analytics, and machine learning technologies.
Responsibilities
Work within project teams to solve data-related challenges, including data quality, integration, transformation, and analytics.
Design, develop, and maintain ETL/ELT processes and data pipelines.
Build and optimize data structures, databases, and data warehouses based on business and product requirements.
Analyze large datasets to identify trends, patterns, and actionable insights.
Develop, implement, and optimize machine learning and analytical models to support business objectives.
Perform data validation, query testing, and data quality assurance to ensure accuracy and reliability.
Collaborate with business users, project managers, and technical teams to gather requirements and deliver data-driven solutions.
Define best practices for data migration, conversion, and governance.
Support project implementation, deployment, and continuous improvement initiatives.
Research and evaluate emerging technologies, tools, and methodologies related to Data Engineering and Data Science.
Requirements
Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Informatics, Statistics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.
Minimum 2 years of experience in Data Engineering, Data Science, Data Analytics, or related fields.
Experience in Banking, Financial Services, Insurance, or Consulting industries is preferred.
Proficiency in SQL and Python.
Experience in at least one of the following areas:
Data Engineering: ETL/ELT, Data Warehouse, Data Modeling, Data Integration, Big Data Processing.
Data Science: Machine Learning, Statistical Analysis, Predictive Modeling, MLOps, Data Visualization.
Experience with data integration tools such as SSIS, Talend, DataStage, or similar technologies.
Familiarity with Big Data technologies such as Spark, Hadoop, Cloudera, or equivalent platforms is an advantage.
Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills.
Data-oriented mindset with a passion for working with large-scale data.
Positive attitude, self-motivated, and able to work effectively both independently and within teams.
Excellent verbal and written communication skills.
Comfortable working directly with clients and collaborating across multiple project stakeholders.

Job Descriptions:
Perform data exploration, data cleaning, data imputation, and feature engineering on unstructured and structured data.
Design, Develop and maintain report used for daily operation, management and analytics
Build the infrastructure for optimal extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) of data from a wide variety of data sources.
Develop and maintain all data flows and prepare all ETL processes according to business requirements and incorporate all business requirements into all design specifications
Identifying, designing and implementing internal process improvements including re-designing infrastructure for greater scalability, optimizing data delivery, and automating manual processes 
Build analytics tools that utilize the data pipeline to provide actionable insights
Explore ways to enhance data quality and reliability Explore ways to enhance data quality and reliability
Document all test procedures for systems and processes              

Job Requirements:
Bachelor's degree from computer science or related fields, or equivalent software engineering experience.
Advanced SQL knowledge and experience working with relational databases, query authoring (SQL). Preferably on MS SQL
Advanced Knowledge in reporting service tools. Preferably Microsoft SSRS
Advanced Knowledge in ETL / data pipeline applications. Preferably Microsoft SSIS.
Experienced in performing root cause analysis on internal and external data and processes to answer specific business questions and identify opportunities for improvement.
Have an understanding and experience regarding the reporting dashboard and data warehouse concepts
Experienced in object-oriented/object function scripting languages: Python, Java, C#,C++, 
Proficiency in source control i.e. Git.
Got 2+ years of experience in Data Engineering role.
Familiar with Azure ETL product like Azure Data Factory, Azure Synapse, Azure Datalake, Azure Devops would be a great addition.

We think you also hate when travel app is giving you a headache, right? A slight misinformation can ruin the trip.
That is exactly what we are tackling as t-fam! Making sure that our 50+ million users have the best experience in crafting their own adventure.
Your main duties in flying with us :
Work with stakeholders throughout the organization to identify opportunities for leveraging company data to drive business solutions.
Mine and analyze data from company databases to drive optimization and improvement of product development, marketing techniques and business strategies.
Design, build, and validate robust data models and machine learning/ deep learning algorithms to improve customer experience, optimize revenue, refine targeting, and support smarter decision making across the organization.
Plan, monitor, and evaluate A/B tests and other experimentation activities for ML models, including test design, success metrics, and model performance assessment.
Collaborate closely with machine learning engineers, and other stakeholders to productionize models, build scalable data pipelines, and ensure reliable deployment and monitoring of ML solutions.
Implement processes, dashboards, and tools to monitor data quality, model performance, and business impact, and iterate on solutions based on findings.
Communicate insights, trade‑offs, and recommendations clearly to both technical and non‑technical audiences through reports, visualizations, and presentations.
Mandatory belongings that you must prepare :
Minimum 4 years of hands‑on experience in data analysis and machine learning, ideally in a product‑driven or business‑focused environment.
A Bachelor in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or another quantitative field.
Strong problem solving skills with an emphasis on product development.
Proficient in programming skills (R, Python, SQL, etc.) for data acquisition, processing and analysis from large data sets.
Knowledge of data science concepts (regression, classification, clustering, properties of distributions, statistical tests and proper usage, etc.) and experience with applications.
Knowledge of a variety of machine learning techniques (Random forest, SVM, artificial neural networks, etc.) and their real-world advantages/drawbacks.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills for coordinating across teams.
A drive to learn and master new technologies and techniques.
In the event that you haven’t received any updates after 3 weeks, your data will be kept and we may contact you for another career destination. Meanwhile, discover more about tiket.com on Instagram, LinkedIn, or YouTube.

About the Role
We are looking for a dynamic, energetic intern to join our team and contribute to the development of our in-house Large Language Model (LLM). In this role, you'll tackle the challenges of data collection, validation, and labeling, directly impacting the quality and effectiveness of our LLM. You'll work closely with our data science and engineering teams, participating in daily standups, and collaborating on live production projects. Over the first six months, you’ll gain hands-on experience in managing and preparing large datasets, ensuring the quality of our AI models, and contributing to cutting-edge AI projects that drive real business value.
About the Team
The GoTo Data Science team is at the forefront of building critical machine learning components that ensure GoTo remains a safe, trusted, and enjoyable platform for digital payments. Our diverse team combines skills in mathematics, statistics, machine learning, and deep learning to solve some of the most challenging business problems in GoPay. We are passionate about both the technical aspects of data science and the tangible business impact of our models. Our collaborative environment encourages sharing knowledge, discussing new ideas, and learning from one another through various internal forums and presentations.
About GoTo Group
GoTo is the largest digital ecosystem in Indonesia. GoTo's mission is to 'empower progress' by offering technology infrastructure and solutions that help everyone to access and thrive in the digital economy.
The GoTo ecosystem provides a wide range of services, including mobility, delivery, payments, financial services, and technology solutions for merchants. The ecosystem also provides e-commerce services through Tokopedia and banking services through its partnership with Bank Jago.
About Gojek 
Gojek is Southeast Asia’s leading on-demand platform and pioneer of the multi-service ecosystem with over 2.5 million driver partners across the regions offering a wide range of services such as transportation, food delivery, logistics and more. With its mission to create impact at scale, Gojek is committed to resolving consumer problems and raising standards of living by connecting consumers to the best providers of goods and services in the market.
About GoTo Financial
GoTo Financial accelerates financial inclusion through its leading financial services and merchants solutions. Its consumer services include GoPay and GoPayLater and serve businesses of all sizes through Midtrans, Moka, GoBiz Plus, GoBiz, and Selly. With its trusted and inclusive ecosystem of products, GoTo Financial is open to new growth opportunities and aims to empower everyone to Make It Happen, Make It Together, Make It Last.

Engineering

job_title: Senior Data Scientist (Analytics) - Grab Financial Services
job_description:
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
GrabFin Analytics team supports the GFin product and business organisations, across Payments, Lending, Insurance, and Kios. As a Senior Data Scientist (Analytics), you will be part of the Lending tech family where we strive to be the best FinTech company in the region. Our team is focused on understanding user experiences and partnering with Business, Product, Design, and Tech teams to achieve the right outcomes. We are integral to product development, from understanding user journeys with UX designers, to developing hypotheses, through to post-rollout optimisation.
Get to Know the Role
You will use data to understand user needs and be the de-facto Voice of the Customer (users, driver-partners, merchants, agents) across Lending's suite of products. You will leverage data to unveil insights to help launch, improve and scale our products. You will champion data-driven decision-making within GFin and partner with Product Managers, Business Owners, UX Designers, and Engineers to design analytical projects that drive the Product roadmap. You will provide thought leadership and generate data-driven hypotheses to solve key Product and Business problems, and drive our GFin strategies forward. You will report into the Lending Analytics Manager and work onsite in the Jakarta South Quarter office.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
You will partner with product, design, and engineering teams to derive insights, design experiments, and drive key product decisions.
You will support strategic plans with data insights, performing deep-dives into user behaviour, segmented views and product efficacy.
You will provide tailored analysis for specific products and strategies, define critical business and product metrics, and make regular recommendations for continuous improvements.
You will design, measure, and recommend A/B tests and multivariate experiments, including layout optimisation, UI/UX efficacy, algorithm effectiveness, and API performance.
You will analyse clickstream and transactional data to uncover insights on user behaviour and drive product metrics. You will manage instrumentation for all feature releases within assigned tech families within GFin.
You will develop self-serve solutions for stakeholders that are scalable and automated to handle a product environment. You will drive plans involving Large Language Models or Generative Artificial Intelligence.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
You have at least 4 years of experience in Analytics, Business Intelligence, or Data Science, in a Tech (FinTech or E-Commerce) company.
You have a Bachelor's Degree in Statistics, Analytics, Economics, Mathematics, Engineering, or related fields.
You are proficient in writing advanced SQL queries and querying large relational databases.
You have hands-on experience with data analysis and programming tools such as Python.
You are skilled in data visualisation platforms like PowerBI or D3.js to present findings.
You have experience designing, running, and analysing A/B tests and product experiments, with knowledge of hypothesis testing and the basic principles of Design of Experiments (DoE).
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

Role: Data Engineer
Location: Jakarta
Position Type: Full-time
Reports to: CTO
About AME Group
AME Group is a leading provider of consulting and research services to the Metals & Mining and Coal & Consumable Fuels industries. Drawing on more than 50 years of industry expertise, we deliver bespoke consulting engagements, subscription research, and software-as-a-service products to clients globally.
About the Role
We are looking for a Data Engineer to design, implement, and maintain the reliable data pipelines that bring data into AME’s research and software products. You will collect and process data from a range of public APIs into a centralized blob storage and database environment, ensuring it is ingested efficiently, transformed cleanly, and made accessible for downstream analysis and reporting.
This role works hands-on with Python-based ETL pipelines, workflow orchestration in Apache Airflow (our data orchestration platform), and cloud storage on Azure. You will work closely with our research team, data scientists, and software developers to make sure the data they depend on is available, accurate, and usable.
A significant part of this role involves managing geospatial data, so you will also work with GIS datasets in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server alongside the core pipeline work.
A Data Engineer is primarily responsible for:
Designing and maintaining the ETL/ELT pipelines that ingest data from public APIs into blob storage and relational databases
Keeping those pipelines reliable through monitoring, logging, and validation
Structuring and transforming data so it is ready for downstream analysis, reporting, and web applications
Managing and maintaining geospatial (GIS) datasets within our SQL Server and ArcGIS Server environment
Documenting data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic clearly
Key Responsibilities
Design and implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines to extract data from multiple public APIs and load it into blob storage and relational databases
Build and manage scheduled workflows in Apache Airflow, our data orchestration platform
Handle complex API integrations, including authentication flows (OAuth2, API keys), pagination, and rate limiting
Structure data in blob storage (e.g. Azure Blob) for efficient downstream access
Transform and load data into structured SQL databases for analytics and access by web applications
Manage and maintain geospatial (GIS) data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server, ensuring it is accurate and accessible to downstream applications
Implement monitoring, logging, and validation to ensure data integrity and pipeline reliability
Work closely with data scientists and software developers to ensure data availability and usability
Maintain clear documentation for data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic
Qualification and Experience
This is a hands-on, production-focused data engineering role. You will spend your time building and maintaining real pipelines that the business depends on, working directly with code, APIs, and cloud infrastructure rather than through managed, no-code tooling. You do not need a background in our industry. However, candidates looking for a purely analytical or reporting role, or who are not comfortable writing production code and working with version control and the command line, will not be progressed.
Required
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience)
3+ years building data pipelines in a production environment
Strong understanding of ETL/ELT architecture, API data ingestion, and data modeling principles
Hands-on experience with Azure
Experience working with geospatial/GIS data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server
Clear communication, including explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
A naturally analytical, detail-oriented mindset with a proactive approach to monitoring and data accuracy
Highly Desirable
Experience integrating data from open economic and financial APIs (e.g. World Bank, IMF, OECD, UN Data, FRED)
Familiarity with large structured and semi-structured datasets (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and associated performance considerations
Experience building incremental ingestion or change data capture (CDC) pipelines
An interest in, or exposure to, the resources, commodities, or research data domain
Technical Skills
Languages: Python and SQL (Microsoft T-SQL)
Orchestration: Apache Airflow
Geospatial: GIS data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server
RESTful API integration (authentication, pagination, error handling)
Azure Blob Storage
Familiarity with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines
Fluent written and spoken English (essential)
What We Offer
Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities
Competitive salary
Health Care
Lunch
13 months salary

POWERBI ENGINEER
Van Oord is looking for bright minds to strengthen our Tendering and Engineering Department in a role focused on developing Business Intelligence solutions. Using Power BI, you will create insights into our Tendering and Engineering organization.
Van Oord is undergoing a digital transformation, leveraging data to monitor and optimize processes during both the tender and execution phases. We use various systems to log our internal processes, and our Tendering and Engineering Department seeks a developer who can integrate different software solutions into dashboards that enhance our internal processes.
YOUR IMPACT
As a Power BI Engineer, you will develop BI dashboards to provide insights into our Tendering and Engineering Department. You will collaborate within a Power BI team to define necessary dashboards, ensure alignment between them, and manage a backlog of BI dashboard requests from the department. Additionally, you will engage with stakeholders to gather feedback, prioritize tasks, and implement improvements.
In this role, you will contribute to the Tendering and Engineering Department with various responsibilities of which the main responsibility is :
Developing PowerBI dashboards to support operational excellence within the department.
Regularly meet with stakeholders to brainstorm and identify key performance indicators (KPIs) for the dashboards.
Analytical thinking to transform the data so it can be used for insights.
Proactively tracking and documenting missing business requirements in the current software and communicating these to relevant managers.
Ensuring alignment between dashboards and other operational excellent initiatives.
Contributing to the continuous improvement of processes and systems while maintaining high data quality.
ABOUT YOU     
You have:
A Bachelor Degree in Engineering, IT or other relevant fields.
Experience as a PowerBI engineer and therefore you :
Understand the limits of the software
Have an extensive knowledge of both the front- and back-end of the software
Have worked with online and local Power BI
Experience with reporting, monitoring and backlog of errors.
The ability to interact with the stakeholders and communicate effectively with other team members.
Good command of the English language, spoken and written.
Ability to explain (complicated) topics in an understandable way to various stakeholders.
You are fulltime available (40 hours) and willing to travel daily to our office in Cibubur.
(Extra) – Experience in PowerApps or Python
ABOUT VAN OORD
Van Oord is a Dutch family-owned company with more than 155 years of experience as an international marine contractor. The focus is on dredging and marine construction, offshore wind, offshore infrastructure and infrastructure in the Netherlands. Its head office is in Rotterdam. Van Oord employs ~5000 staff with 84 different nationalities, who worked on 194 projects in 43 countries. The fleet consists of a large amount of vessels special-purpose and auxiliary equipment. Van Oord delivers marine ingenuity by using smart, innovative and sustainable solutions to create a better world for future generations.
ABOUT THE TEAM
In the position of PowerBI Engineer you will be part of one of the Van Oord teams in Indonesia. Currently 30 people are working from the office in Cibubur, just South of Jakarta, as part of the Van Oord Tendering and Engineering Department, located in The Netherlands.
(Office address in Cibubur: Citra Gran RCW2 No.15 Jl. Alternatif Cibubur KM4 Bekasi Jawa barat 17435)
WE OFFER YOU
We offer you a position in which you will have an important contribution to our mission 'building a better world for future generations'. In addition, we offer you amongst others:
A salary that matches your responsibilities and experience;
Employment benefits package like our other Van Oord colleagues in Indonesia;
Extensive learning and (personal) development possibilities, including a wide range of online courses via Goodhabitz; 
A buddy in Rotterdam of similar age who can help you with all the questions you have.

Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.
Job Description
Get to Know the Team
We are dedicated to consolidating data from different sources to provide a coherent and unified view for finance stakeholders. We prioritize data consistency, quality, and accessibility, and we thrive on cross-functional collaboration to meet the diverse needs of our business.
Get to Know the Role
As a Data Analyst, Finance Product & Data Integration at Grab, you will consolidate data from various sources to provide a unified view for finance stakeholders. You will ensure data consistency, quality, and accessibility, while collaborating with Finance, business teams, and the Data Engineering team. Your role includes maintaining databases, ensuring data integrity and security, and conducting regular audits and quality checks. Robust analytical skills, attention to detail, and cross-functional collaboration are essential for this position. You will be reporting to Senior Manager, Finance Data Solutions and based on-site in our Malaysia office.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
You will develop data integration solutions that match business requirements, craft SQL scripts, examine source data structures, detect data quality inconsistencies, and design strategies to handle data integration obstacles.
You will work with finance stakeholders, engineers, and product teams to comprehend the associated business processes and transform these understandings into technical scripts.
You will design and deploy data integration solutions, select appropriate data integration tools, develop data mapping, set up transformation and load (ETL) processes, and construct data integration workflows.
You will analyze requirements, and develop financial operational reports or dashboards, including automating existing reporting procedures.
You will provide technical support to resolve data integration issues and troubleshoot data-related problems.
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
Bachelor's Degree in Data Analytics, Business Analytics, Finance, Economics, Statistics, Computer Science or a related field.
5+ years exposure at minimum in finance operations/data analytics/business intelligence area.
Must be fluent in SQL language, comfortable diving in messy and scattered data.
Exposure in financial reporting, Oracle ERP and data reconciliation is preferred.
Exposure to python is preferred.
Adept at explaining technical concepts to non-technical audiences.
Delivers high numerical accuracy while independently identifying and streamlining manual tasks.
Understanding of accounting principles & financial theories.
Familiar with AI automation tools Claude , Cursor.
Familiarity with project management methodologies and best practices.
Additional Information
Life at Grab
We care about your well-being at Grab, here are some of the global benefits we offer:
We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.
Celebrate moments that matter in life with loved ones through Parental and Birthday leave, and give back to your communities through Love-all-Serve-all (LASA) volunteering leave
We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

Role: Data Engineer
Location: Jakarta
Position Type: Full-time
Reports to: CTO
About AME Group
AME Group is a leading provider of consulting and research services to the Metals & Mining and Coal & Consumable Fuels industries. Drawing on more than 50 years of industry expertise, we deliver bespoke consulting engagements, subscription research, and software-as-a-service products to clients globally.
About the Role
We are looking for a Data Engineer to design, implement, and maintain the reliable data pipelines that bring data into AME’s research and software products. You will collect and process data from a range of public APIs into a centralized blob storage and database environment, ensuring it is ingested efficiently, transformed cleanly, and made accessible for downstream analysis and reporting.
This role works hands-on with Python-based ETL pipelines, workflow orchestration in Apache Airflow (our data orchestration platform), and cloud storage on Azure. You will work closely with our research team, data scientists, and software developers to make sure the data they depend on is available, accurate, and usable.
A significant part of this role involves managing geospatial data, so you will also work with GIS datasets in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server alongside the core pipeline work.
A Data Engineer is primarily responsible for:
Designing and maintaining the ETL/ELT pipelines that ingest data from public APIs into blob storage and relational databases
Keeping those pipelines reliable through monitoring, logging, and validation
Structuring and transforming data so it is ready for downstream analysis, reporting, and web applications
Managing and maintaining geospatial (GIS) datasets within our SQL Server and ArcGIS Server environment
Documenting data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic clearly
Key Responsibilities
Design and implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines to extract data from multiple public APIs and load it into blob storage and relational databases
Build and manage scheduled workflows in Apache Airflow, our data orchestration platform
Handle complex API integrations, including authentication flows (OAuth2, API keys), pagination, and rate limiting
Structure data in blob storage (e.g. Azure Blob) for efficient downstream access
Transform and load data into structured SQL databases for analytics and access by web applications
Manage and maintain geospatial (GIS) data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server, ensuring it is accurate and accessible to downstream applications
Implement monitoring, logging, and validation to ensure data integrity and pipeline reliability
Work closely with data scientists and software developers to ensure data availability and usability
Maintain clear documentation for data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic
Qualification and Experience
This is a hands-on, production-focused data engineering role. You will spend your time building and maintaining real pipelines that the business depends on, working directly with code, APIs, and cloud infrastructure rather than through managed, no-code tooling. You do not need a background in our industry. However, candidates looking for a purely analytical or reporting role, or who are not comfortable writing production code and working with version control and the command line, will not be progressed.
Required
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience)
3+ years building data pipelines in a production environment
Strong understanding of ETL/ELT architecture, API data ingestion, and data modeling principles
Hands-on experience with Azure
Experience working with geospatial/GIS data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server
Clear communication, including explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
A naturally analytical, detail-oriented mindset with a proactive approach to monitoring and data accuracy
Highly Desirable
Experience integrating data from open economic and financial APIs (e.g. World Bank, IMF, OECD, UN Data, FRED)
Familiarity with large structured and semi-structured datasets (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and associated performance considerations
Experience building incremental ingestion or change data capture (CDC) pipelines
An interest in, or exposure to, the resources, commodities, or research data domain
Technical Skills
Languages: Python and SQL (Microsoft T-SQL)
Orchestration: Apache Airflow
Geospatial: GIS data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server
RESTful API integration (authentication, pagination, error handling)
Azure Blob Storage
Familiarity with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines
Fluent written and spoken English (essential)
What We Offer
Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities
Competitive salary
Health Care
Lunch
13 months salary

About DayOne 
Behind every app, every AI tool, every connected experience, there is a data center. DayOne builds them. In Indonesia, we are building the first of a new kind. DayOne's 72MW LEED Gold campus at Nongsa Digital Park (NDP) in Batam is the island's first world-class hyperscale data center, developed in partnership with the Indonesia Investment Authority (INA) inside a Special Economic Zone with direct connectivity to Singapore and access to 15+ submarine cables. Backed by US$2B+ in Series C funding, operating across seven countries. 
About the Role 
Indonesia's digital infrastructure is being built right now, and DayOne is at the centre of it. As Shift Technician for Critical Infrastructure Operations, you will be one of the people keeping it running. 
This is a hands-on technical role on the operations floor of Batam's first hyperscale data center. You will monitor and maintain the critical systems that power and cool the facility, respond to incidents, and ensure every shift runs to the highest standard. The work you do here directly protects the digital services that enterprises across the region depend on. 
Your Responsibilities 
Operations and Maintenance 
Monitor and maintain critical infrastructure systems including cooling, power distribution, UPS, generators, and fire suppression 
Conduct regular inspections and preventive maintenance on all equipment to OEM and DayOne standards 
Respond promptly to alarms and incidents, performing troubleshooting and repairs as needed 
System Monitoring 
Use Building Management Systems (BMS) and monitoring tools to oversee facility operations 
Record and analyse data from monitoring systems to ensure optimal performance and identify potential issues early 
Incident Management 
Manage and escalate incidents according to established protocols 
Coordinate with vendors and service providers for troubleshooting and repairs 
Document all incidents, maintenance activities, and repairs in the maintenance management system 
Health and Safety 
Adhere to all safety protocols and procedures at all times 
Participate in safety drills and training sessions 
Report any safety hazards or incidents to the Shift Supervisor promptly 
Team Collaboration 
Work closely with shift technicians and support staff to ensure seamless shift transitions 
Contribute to team meetings and continuous improvement initiatives 

Requirements 
Hands-on experience in data center operations or a similar critical infrastructure environment 
Technical proficiency in data center or similar systems: power, cooling, and building management 
Knowledge of safety protocols, compliance standards, and shift operations in a 24/7 environment 
Willingness to work rotating shifts including nights, weekends, and public holidays 
Bachelor's degree in Engineering, or a related field 
Collaborative team player who supports others and contributes to a high-performing shift culture 

Nice to Have 
Familiarity with Indonesian safety regulations and compliance frameworks 
Experience with BMS or Data Center Infrastructure Management (DCIM) platforms 
Prior exposure to commissioning or integration of new systems and equipment 

Why DayOne 
Joining DayOne in Batam means being part of something genuinely new: the first campus of its kind on the island, backed by the Indonesian government and connected into one of the world's most active digital corridors. The people joining now are the ones shaping what excellence looks like in this market. You will be supported with real training, meaningful development, and a team that is fully invested in building this right.

About DayOne 
Behind every app, every AI tool, every connected experience, there is a data center. DayOne builds them. In Indonesia, we are building the first of a new kind. DayOne's 72MW LEED Gold campus at Nongsa Digital Park (NDP) in Batam is the island's first world-class hyperscale data center, developed in partnership with the Indonesia Investment Authority (INA) inside a Special Economic Zone with direct connectivity to Singapore and access to 15+ submarine cables. Backed by US$2B+ in Series C funding, operating across seven countries. 

About the Role 
Indonesia's digital infrastructure is being built right now, and DayOne is at the centre of it. As Shift Lead for Critical Infrastructure Operations, you will be one of the people making sure it stays running. 
This is a leadership role on the operations floor of Batam's first hyperscale data center. You will lead a team of shift technicians through every hour of the shift, keeping critical systems running, resolving issues before they escalate, and handing over a facility that is in better shape than when you arrived. The decisions you make here directly protect the digital services that enterprises and businesses across the region depend on. 
Your Responsibilities 
Team Leadership 
Lead and manage a team of shift technicians, ensuring they perform their duties effectively and safely 
Provide guidance and support to team members, building a collaborative and high-performing shift culture 
Conduct regular performance reviews and give feedback that helps people grow in the role 
Operational Oversight 
Ensure all data center operations run smoothly and efficiently throughout your shift 
Monitor critical services and building systems, identify potential issues early, and act before they become problems 
Coordinate with other departments and stakeholders to resolve operational challenges quickly and cleanly 
Shift Handover Management 
Prepare detailed shift handover reports documenting all relevant information, incidents, and actions taken 
Ensure handover reports are complete and communicated effectively before the end of each shift 
Lead shift handover meetings to brief the incoming team on current status and any ongoing issues 
Compliance and Safety 
Ensure full compliance with safety protocols, standard operating procedures (SOPs), and regulatory requirements at all times 
Conduct regular safety drills and training sessions for your shift team 
Report and document any safety incidents or near-misses promptly and accurately 
Technical Support 
Provide hands-on technical assistance to your team as needed 
Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues that arise during the shift 
Coordinate with technical support teams for complex problem resolution 
Continuous Improvement 
Identify opportunities for process improvements and operational efficiencies 
Implement best practices and improvement initiatives within your shift team 
Participate in training and development programmes to build your own skills and those of the people around you 
 
Requirements 
Hands-on experience in data center operations or a similar critical infrastructure environment  
Technical proficiency in data center or similar systems: power, cooling, and building management  
Knowledge of safety protocols, compliance standards, and shift operations in a 24/7 environment  
Willingness to work rotating shifts including nights, weekends, and public holidays  
Bachelor's degree in Engineering, or a related field 

Nice to Have 
Prior experience in a lead or supervisory role in operations 
Familiarity with Indonesian safety regulations and compliance frameworks 
Experience with Building Management Systems (BMS) or Data Center Infrastructure Management (DCIM) platforms 

Why DayOne? 
Joining DayOne in Batam means being part of something genuinely new: the first campus of its kind on the island, backed by the Indonesian government and connected into one of the world's most active digital corridors. The people joining now are the ones shaping what excellence looks like in this market. You will be supported with real training, meaningful development, and a team that is fully invested in building this right.

Cost Break Down & Costing Analysis

Pricing & Price Lists

job_title: Lead Full-Stack Product Engineer (AI, UI/UX, Mobile App & Web Development)
job_description:
Lead Full-Stack Product Engineer (AI-Accelerated / UI/UX, Web & Mobile App Developer)
About Us

Prestige Rentals is a 12 year standing Luxury Rentals in specialising in cars, motorbikes, helicopters, private jets and yachts. Join our dynamic team as a full-time Full Stack Web & Mobile App Developer. Based in Bali, you are welcome to work from the convenience of your home to play a key role in automating and scaling our luxury rental company. Your strategic approach implementing a moden and technically advanced system will be instrumental in expanding our client base and strengthening our position in the luxury rental market.
About the Role
We are seeking an exceptional, entrepreneurial Lead Full-Stack Product Engineer to design, build, and launch our next-generation Prestige Rentals Platform from scratch. This is a full-time, end-to-end ownership role. You will be the sole architect of both our mobile (iOS/Android) and web applications, handling everything from initial UI/UX wireframing to backend automation.
Because you will be building a complex ecosystem (combining features akin to Airbnb, Turo, and Uber), we expect you to be an AI-native developer. You should have extensive experience building websites and apps from start to finish by aggressively utilizing advanced AI tools, agents, and workflows (specifically Anthropic’s Claude Code, AI-assisted IDEs, and open-source AI agent frameworks) to maximize output, ensure rapid deployment, and maintain clean, scalable code.

Key Responsibilities
AI-Driven Development: Architect and build the web and mobile applications from the ground up using state-of-the-art AI development tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, AI agents) to dramatically accelerate the development lifecycle.
UI/UX Product Design: Conceptualize and design a high-end, luxury-grade user interface. Create wireframes, user flows, and high-fidelity prototypes that reflect a premium brand experience.
Frontend & Backend Development: Build cross-platform mobile applications (iOS & Android) and a responsive web application, backed by a robust, fully automated backend infrastructure.
Logistics & Automation Architecture: Implement real-time tracking, scheduling, complex booking engines, automated identity verification, and dynamic pricing algorithms.
DevOps & CI/CD: Set up cloud infrastructure, manage automated testing pipelines, and handle app store submissions and web hosting.

Maintenance & Security
Proactive Visual & Trend Evolution: Use your own initiative to continuously monitor digital design shifts. You will naturally update and refresh our graphics, UI components, and brand assets to ensure the platform always looks ultra-modern and perfectly aligned with the latest luxury tech trends.
Tax & Regulatory System Updates: Ensure the platform's financial infrastructure, payment gateways, and backend systems are consistently updated to comply with evolving tax laws, localized rental regulations, and automated invoicing requirements.
High-Grade Security Measures: Implement, monitor, and maintain the highest possible security standards. This includes end-to-end data encryption, secure API protocols, routine vulnerability patching, and strict data privacy compliance to safeguard our high-net-worth clientele and premium fleet data.

Scalability
Strict Clean Coding Standards: Act as the ultimate gatekeeper of the codebase. While leveraging AI tools like Claude Code for speed, you must ensure all output adheres to strict clean-coding principles (SOLID principles, modular design, and dry code). You will prevent AI-generated technical debt by enforcing strict linting, type-safety, and comprehensive self-documentation.
Performance Optimization for High Demand: Write highly efficient database queries, optimize API response times, and implement smart caching layers (e.g., Redis) to handle intense traffic spikes, real-time geofencing, and concurrent booking requests smoothly.
Future-Proof & Decoupled Architecture: Design a highly scalable, stateless backend and decoupled frontend architecture. The platform must be structured so that as demand scales, it can seamlessly transition from a clean monolith to microservices, allowing future developers to onboard instantly and scale individual features without breaking the core system.
Required Skills & Qualifications
AI-Native Workflows: Extensive, hands-on experience building full-stack applications utilizing modern AI tools. Must be highly proficient with Claude Code, Cursor/Copilot, and familiar with open-source AI agent frameworks to optimize coding efficiency.
Full-Stack Track Record: 5+ years of software engineering experience, with a proven track record of shipping production-ready mobile and web apps from start to finish.
Design Capabilities: Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD, with a strong portfolio demonstrating clean, intuitive, and premium UI/UX design.
Mobile & Web Frameworks: Expert-level experience with cross-platform frameworks (e.g., React Native, Flutter) and modern web stacks (e.g., React, Next.js, Node.js, Python).
Automation & APIs: Deep understanding of background workers, cron jobs, database management, and integrating complex third-party APIs (Stripe, Maps, SMS/Push).

Bonus Points If You Have:
Contributed to or deeply customized open-source AI developer tools or autonomous coding agents.
Prior experience building marketplace, on-demand logistics, or rental applications.
A "Founding Engineer" mindset—the ability to act as a product owner, not just a code writer.

job_title: Lead Full-Stack Product Engineer (AI, UI/UX, Mobile App & Web Development)
job_description:
Lead Full-Stack Product Engineer (AI-Accelerated / UI/UX, Web & Mobile App Developer)
About Us

Prestige Rentals is a 12 year standing Luxury Rentals in specialising in cars, motorbikes, helicopters, private jets and yachts. Join our dynamic team as a full-time Full Stack Web & Mobile App Developer. Based in Bali, you are welcome to work from the convenience of your home to play a key role in automating and scaling our luxury rental company. Your strategic approach implementing a moden and technically advanced system will be instrumental in expanding our client base and strengthening our position in the luxury rental market.
About the Role
We are seeking an exceptional, entrepreneurial Lead Full-Stack Product Engineer to design, build, and launch our next-generation Prestige Rentals Platform from scratch. This is a full-time, end-to-end ownership role. You will be the sole architect of both our mobile (iOS/Android) and web applications, handling everything from initial UI/UX wireframing to backend automation.
Because you will be building a complex ecosystem (combining features akin to Airbnb, Turo, and Uber), we expect you to be an AI-native developer. You should have extensive experience building websites and apps from start to finish by aggressively utilizing advanced AI tools, agents, and workflows (specifically Anthropic’s Claude Code, AI-assisted IDEs, and open-source AI agent frameworks) to maximize output, ensure rapid deployment, and maintain clean, scalable code.

Key Responsibilities
AI-Driven Development: Architect and build the web and mobile applications from the ground up using state-of-the-art AI development tools (e.g., Claude Code, Cursor, AI agents) to dramatically accelerate the development lifecycle.
UI/UX Product Design: Conceptualize and design a high-end, luxury-grade user interface. Create wireframes, user flows, and high-fidelity prototypes that reflect a premium brand experience.
Frontend & Backend Development: Build cross-platform mobile applications (iOS & Android) and a responsive web application, backed by a robust, fully automated backend infrastructure.
Logistics & Automation Architecture: Implement real-time tracking, scheduling, complex booking engines, automated identity verification, and dynamic pricing algorithms.
DevOps & CI/CD: Set up cloud infrastructure, manage automated testing pipelines, and handle app store submissions and web hosting.

Maintenance & Security
Proactive Visual & Trend Evolution: Use your own initiative to continuously monitor digital design shifts. You will naturally update and refresh our graphics, UI components, and brand assets to ensure the platform always looks ultra-modern and perfectly aligned with the latest luxury tech trends.
Tax & Regulatory System Updates: Ensure the platform's financial infrastructure, payment gateways, and backend systems are consistently updated to comply with evolving tax laws, localized rental regulations, and automated invoicing requirements.
High-Grade Security Measures: Implement, monitor, and maintain the highest possible security standards. This includes end-to-end data encryption, secure API protocols, routine vulnerability patching, and strict data privacy compliance to safeguard our high-net-worth clientele and premium fleet data.

Scalability
Strict Clean Coding Standards: Act as the ultimate gatekeeper of the codebase. While leveraging AI tools like Claude Code for speed, you must ensure all output adheres to strict clean-coding principles (SOLID principles, modular design, and dry code). You will prevent AI-generated technical debt by enforcing strict linting, type-safety, and comprehensive self-documentation.
Performance Optimization for High Demand: Write highly efficient database queries, optimize API response times, and implement smart caching layers (e.g., Redis) to handle intense traffic spikes, real-time geofencing, and concurrent booking requests smoothly.
Future-Proof & Decoupled Architecture: Design a highly scalable, stateless backend and decoupled frontend architecture. The platform must be structured so that as demand scales, it can seamlessly transition from a clean monolith to microservices, allowing future developers to onboard instantly and scale individual features without breaking the core system.
Required Skills & Qualifications
AI-Native Workflows: Extensive, hands-on experience building full-stack applications utilizing modern AI tools. Must be highly proficient with Claude Code, Cursor/Copilot, and familiar with open-source AI agent frameworks to optimize coding efficiency.
Full-Stack Track Record: 5+ years of software engineering experience, with a proven track record of shipping production-ready mobile and web apps from start to finish.
Design Capabilities: Proficiency in Figma or Adobe XD, with a strong portfolio demonstrating clean, intuitive, and premium UI/UX design.
Mobile & Web Frameworks: Expert-level experience with cross-platform frameworks (e.g., React Native, Flutter) and modern web stacks (e.g., React, Next.js, Node.js, Python).
Automation & APIs: Deep understanding of background workers, cron jobs, database management, and integrating complex third-party APIs (Stripe, Maps, SMS/Push).

Bonus Points If You Have:
Contributed to or deeply customized open-source AI developer tools or autonomous coding agents.
Prior experience building marketplace, on-demand logistics, or rental applications.
A "Founding Engineer" mindset—the ability to act as a product owner, not just a code writer.

Contact
Prestige Rentals Pty Ltd
www.prestige-rentals.com.au
inf•@prestige.rentals
@prestige.rentals
Matthew Sannen

Deskripsi Singkat Pekerjaan (Job Summary)
AI Engineer bertanggung jawab untuk membangun, melatih, dan menerapkan model kecerdasan buatan (AI) dalam produk dan proses bisnis perusahaan. Peran ini mencakup riset teknis, pengembangan model machine learning atau deep learning, serta integrasi ke dalam sistem produksi.
Kualifikasi (Qualifications)
Hard Skills:
• Menguasai bahasa pemrograman Python (wajib), opsional: R, C++.
• Menguasai pustaka AI/ML seperti TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn.
• Paham algoritma machine learning (regresi, klasifikasi, clustering, boosting, dll).
• Paham deep learning (CNN, RNN, Transformer, LSTM).
• Pengalaman dengan data preprocessing dan feature engineering.
• Familiar dengan deployment tools: Docker, FastAPI, Flask, atau REST API.
• Pengalaman dengan cloud AI platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, Azure ML) menjadi nilai tambah.
Soft Skills:
• Kuat dalam problem-solving dan analisis logis.
• Mampu bekerja kolaboratif dalam tim lintas fungsi.
• Mampu menyampaikan hasil teknis ke stakeholder non-teknis.
Latar Belakang Pendidikan:
• S1/S2 di bidang Ilmu Komputer, Matematika, Teknik Informatika, Statistik, atau bidang relevan lainnya.
• Sertifikasi seperti Google Cloud ML Engineer, TensorFlow Developer, atau lainnya adalah nilai tambah.
Pengalaman:
• Fresh graduate dengan portofolio kuat dipertimbangkan.
• Untuk level mid-senior: 2–5 tahun pengalaman dalam pengembangan model AI/ML.

Responsibility:
Design, develop, and deploy scalable, robust, and secure machine learning and AI models into production environments.
Fine-tune, evaluate, and optimize open-source and proprietary models (e.g., LLMs, diffusion models, or traditional deep learning networks) for performance, latency, and cost-efficiency.
Ensuring clean, structured, and high-quality data for training and evaluation including Instruction Fine-Tuning, Classification / Text Extraction, Domain Adaptation, Data Cleaning, Formatting & Tokenization
Implement and maintain robust practices, including automated model training, versioning, CI/CD pipelines, and real-time monitoring of models in production.
Lead architectural decisions, conduct code and model reviews, and mentor mid-level and junior engineers to foster a culture of technical excellence.
Stay at the forefront of AI research. Evaluate new frameworks, research papers, and technologies to continuously improve our AI capabilities.

Qualification:
Bachelor’s in Computer Science, Data Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related quantitative field.
Minimum of 5+ years of professional software engineering experience, with at least 3+ years dedicated to building and deploying AI/ML models in production.
Strong proficiency in Python and deep familiarity with core software engineering practices (OOP, clean code, unit testing, git).
Deep hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, or JAX, as well as ecosystem tools like Hugging Face (Transformers, Accelerate).
Proven experience working with Large Language Models, prompt engineering, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, Milvus, Chroma), and orchestration frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex).
Experience deploying models on cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) utilizing Docker/Kubernetes. Familiarity with MLOps tools like MLflow, Weights&Biases, or Kubeflow.
Proficiency in SQL and data processing libraries (e.g., Pandas, NumPy) and distributed computing frameworks (e.g., Spark) is a plus.

Senior AI Engineer
PT Gemilang Satria Perkasa is looking for a Senior AI Engineer to lead, architect, and deliver production-grade AI agent systems, LLM applications, RAG pipelines, and intelligent automation solutions for enterprise, defence, security, and digital transformation projects.
Responsibilities
Architect and build production-grade AI agents using LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex, or similar frameworks.

Build backend APIs using Python, FastAPI, Flask, or equivalent tools.
Connect AI agents to APIs, databases, documents, dashboards, and enterprise systems.
Design advanced prompt engineering strategies, memory management, tool calling, structured output, and multi-agent workflow orchestration.
Define evaluation frameworks, reduce hallucinations, and continuously improve system reliability and accuracy at scale.
Deploy and maintain AI services using Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Linux, CI/CD pipelines, and production-ready engineering practices.
Lead technical design and architecture reviews for AI systems; set coding standards and best practices for the team.
Mentor and coach junior and mid-level AI Engineers; conduct code reviews and technical onboarding.
Collaborate with product, business, and stakeholder teams to translate requirements into scalable AI solutions.
Requirements
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, Software Engineering, or a related field (Master’s degree is an advantage).
5+ years of experience in AI Engineering, ML Engineering, Backend Engineering, or Software Engineering, with at least 2 years in a senior or tech lead capacity.
Proven track record of designing and delivering LLM, RAG, agentic AI, and AI automation systems in production environments.
Expert-level Python programming skills; proficiency in TypeScript or another secondary language is a plus.
Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex, or similar.
Experience with vector databases such as FAISS, ChromaDB, Qdrant, Milvus, Weaviate, Pinecone, or Elasticsearch.
Proficient with REST API design, SQL/NoSQL databases, Docker, Kubernetes, Git, Linux, and cloud infrastructure basics.
Deep understanding of prompt engineering, embeddings, retrieval strategies, evaluation pipelines, and LLM limitations in production contexts.
Preferred
Experience in defence, security, intelligence, OSINT, fintech, compliance, or enterprise automation.
Experience with local LLM deployment, fine-tuning, Whisper, knowledge graph, or multimodal AI.
Familiarity with AI governance, cybersecurity, and data privacy.
Able to independently manage complex, multi-stakeholder AI projects in a fast-paced system integration environment.
Portfolio or demonstrable experience leading or architecting end-to-end AI solutions in an organizational or enterprise context.

About the Role
We're building AI-powered systems that actually move the business forward — not demos that live in decks. As our AI Automation Engineer, you'll be the person who makes it happen: wiring LLMs into real workflows, shipping AI agents, and finding automation wins across marketing, ops, and client projects.
If you love tinkering with prompts at midnight, get excited when a webhook fires correctly, and can explain why a model hallucinated — this is your seat.
What You'll Do
•     Build and maintain AI agents using platforms like Dify, Flowise, and OpenClaw
•     Integrate LLM APIs (Claude, OpenAI, etc.) into internal tools and client systems
•     Connect chatbots to WhatsApp, email, and other messaging channels
•     Write, test, and optimize prompts — system prompts, few-shot templates, output parsers
•     Identify automation opportunities in ops, marketing, and admin; then build them
•     Keep pipelines healthy: error handling, retry logic, monitoring
•     Stay sharp on the latest in AI tooling and share what you learn with the team
What We're Looking For
Must-haves:
•     Solid prompt engineering skills — chain-of-thought, structured outputs, JSON mode
•     Hands-on experience with LLM APIs (tokens, context windows, tool/function calling)
•     Comfortable with REST APIs and authentication flows (API keys, OAuth 2.0)
•     Git for version control — this is non-negotiable
•     Logical thinker who can turn a business problem into a clean automation flow
Nice to haves:
•     WhatsApp Business API or Telegram Bot API experience
•     Familiarity with PostgreSQL/MySQL and Redis
•     Basic Docker and VPS deployment know-how
•     Can read English technical docs without breaking a sweat
Who You Are
•     Curious — you learn new tools before anyone asks you to
•     Detail-obsessed — edge cases don't scare you, they excite you
•     A communicator — you can explain AI limitations to a non-technical stakeholder
•     Self-directed — you don't wait to be told what to explore next
Education
D3 or S1 in Computer Science, Information Systems, or a related field. Fresh graduates welcome — show us your projects.

Tanggung Jawab :
● Merancang, mengembangkan, dan mengimplementasikan sistem AI dan robotika untuk mendukung berbagai keperluan operasional dan bisnis.
● Melakukan eksplorasi dan analisis data sensorik untuk meningkatkan efisiensi dan efektivitas robot.

job_title: Senior Front End Engineer (AI & Web Platform)
job_description:
💡 About the Role
We are seeking an autonomous, highly skilled Front End Engineer with approximately 5 years of professional experience to spearhead our front-end initiatives. In this role, you will hold a broad and impactful scope: from driving the client-side engineering of our cutting-edge, real-time AI Avatar project, to crafting sophisticated internal data dashboards, to keeping our core company website modern and performant.
You are a versatile developer who thrives at the intersection of UI/UX and system integration. You understand both the aesthetic details of a beautiful interface and the underlying logic of data flows, allowing you to seamlessly bridge the gap between frontend experiences and backend architectures.

🛠️ What You’ll Do
-        Pioneer the Front-End for AI Avatars: Lead the development of our interactive, real-time AI avatar client, leveraging advanced browser APIs and handling low-latency, real-time data streams.
-        Architect Core Platforms & Dashboards: Design and scale highly responsive web applications, including corporate web properties and complex data-rich internal dashboards using React and TypeScript.
-        Collaborate on System & API Design: Partner closely with backend engineers to co-design and seamlessly integrate RESTful APIs and WebSocket architectures, actively participating in system design and data-flow planning.
-        Translate Vision into Code: Create high-fidelity Figma mockups and translate them into reusable, componentized, and accessible frontend assets.
-        Optimize Performance: Drive frontend engineering best practices, ensuring all client applications are exceptionally performant, modular, and optimized for maximum speed.

✅ What We’re Looking For
-        Proven Track Record: 5+ years of professional software engineering experience, with a heavy emphasis on building complex, production-grade front-end applications.
-        Modern React & TypeScript Mastery: Deep, production-tested expertise in React and TypeScript, including advanced state management patterns (Zustand, Redux) and modern bundling tools (Vite, Webpack).
-        Real-Time Web Expertise: Practical experience implementing and debugging real-time communication channels, specifically WebSockets.
-        Robust API & Data Literacy: Proven competence in consuming and collaborating on RESTful API design. A solid understanding of relational/non-relational database principles, data modeling, and practical CRUD operations.
-        Architectural Mindset: Experience actively participating in overall system architecture and data flow design. You can think like a system analyst to map out how data moves across the stack.
-        Eye for Design & UX: Exceptional skill in CSS/SCSS and utility frameworks (Tailwind CSS), paired with a strong design sensibility and proficiency in navigating Figma.
-        Independence & Ownership: A self-starter mindset with the ability to take projects from concept to deployment independently in a fast-paced environment.
🌟 Nice to Have
-        Experience with advanced web media and rendering technologies (WebGL, GLSL shaders, WebAudio API, WebAssembly).
-        A strong understanding of real-time systems principles (latency, jitter, backpressure management).
-        Experience with cross-platform desktop/mobile wrappers (Capacitor, Electron).

Bertanggung jawab mengelola, mengembangkan, dan memastikan stabilitas sistem AI, automasi, aplikasi internal, database, serta integrasi sistem yang digunakan oleh Wiselie agar dapat berjalan secara efektif, aman, dan mendukung operasional bisnis.

Melakukan troubleshooting, debugging, dan penyelesaian incident pada sistem, integrasi API, maupun automasi.
Membangun dashboard monitoring untuk memantau performa sistem, automasi, dan proses bisnis.
Membuat dokumentasi teknis, SOP, deployment guide, dan incident report.
Berkolaborasi dengan berbagai departemen untuk menerjemahkan kebutuhan bisnis menjadi solusi teknologi yang efektif.

job_title: Lead Engineer, AI Agents & Backend Platforms
job_description:
Company Description
About Grab and Our Workplace
Grab is Southeast Asia's leading superapp. From getting your favourite meals delivered to helping you manage your finances and getting around town hassle-free, we've got your back with everything. In Grab, purpose gives us joy and habits build excellence, while harnessing the power of Technology and AI to deliver the mission of driving Southeast Asia forward by economically empowering everyone, with heart, hunger, honour, and humility.

Come join the GTS Innovation team - we work on a diverse set of consumer problems and build sustainable solutions to provide meaningful outcomes for GTS and for Grabbers. Our focus is on creating specialized AI-driven products and tools that address specific business needs across Corporate teams at Grab. We are looking for passionate developers who not only have the necessary skills but also offer more, to become part of our team. Get to Know the Role
You will lead the design, development, and maintenance of our corporate systems, driving technological advancements and setting the standard for engineering excellence. You will be reporting to Principal Enterprise Architect - Automation and Integration.
This role is onsite based in our Petaling Jaya, Malaysia office.
The Critical Tasks You Will Perform
You will architect and design scalable, AI-driven products and tools
You will collaborate with teams to define technical strategies and feature specifications
You will make high-level design decisions and establish technical standards for software development
You will optimize system performance, reliability, and efficiency across the product ecosystem
You will provide technical guidance and code reviews to ensure best practices are followed
You will partner with DevOps teams to enhance system scalability and operational efficiency
You will stay current with emerging technologies and industry trends to drive innovation within the team
Qualifications
What Essential Skills You Will Need
You have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field
You have at least 8 years of software engineering experience, with 5+ years focused on designing and building scalable systems
You have foundation in data structures, algorithms, operating systems, and networking

You have experience with backend systems, including databases, caching, NoSQL, and application servers
You have experience leading and mentoring engineering teams
You have experience with cloud services, OLTP systems, and consumer-facing products
You have experience with microservices architecture and RESTful API design
You have familiarity with DevOps practices and CI/CD pipelines
You have demonstrated leadership in driving technical decisions and defining engineering standards
Additional Information
Life at Grab

We have your back with Term Life Insurance and comprehensive Medical Insurance.
With GrabFlex, create a benefits package that suits your needs and aspirations.

We have a confidential Grabber Assistance Programme to guide and uplift you and your loved ones through life's challenges.
Balancing personal commitments and life's demands are made easier with our FlexWork arrangements such as differentiated hours
What We Stand For At Grab
We are committed to building an inclusive and equitable workplace that provides equal opportunity for Grabbers to grow and perform at their best. We consider all candidates fairly and equally regardless of nationality, ethnicity, race, religion, age, gender, family commitments, physical and mental impairments or disabilities, and other attributes that make them unique.

If you are ready to embark on an exciting data-driven journey with us, we encourage you to apply now.

Role: Data Engineer
Location: Jakarta
Position Type: Full-time
Reports to: CTO
About AME Group
AME Group is a leading provider of consulting and research services to the Metals & Mining and Coal & Consumable Fuels industries. Drawing on more than 50 years of industry expertise, we deliver bespoke consulting engagements, subscription research, and software-as-a-service products to clients globally.
About the Role
We are looking for a Data Engineer to design, implement, and maintain the reliable data pipelines that bring data into AME’s research and software products. You will collect and process data from a range of public APIs into a centralized blob storage and database environment, ensuring it is ingested efficiently, transformed cleanly, and made accessible for downstream analysis and reporting.
This role works hands-on with Python-based ETL pipelines, workflow orchestration in Apache Airflow (our data orchestration platform), and cloud storage on Azure. You will work closely with our research team, data scientists, and software developers to make sure the data they depend on is available, accurate, and usable.
A significant part of this role involves managing geospatial data, so you will also work with GIS datasets in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server alongside the core pipeline work.
A Data Engineer is primarily responsible for:
Designing and maintaining the ETL/ELT pipelines that ingest data from public APIs into blob storage and relational databases
Keeping those pipelines reliable through monitoring, logging, and validation
Structuring and transforming data so it is ready for downstream analysis, reporting, and web applications
Managing and maintaining geospatial (GIS) datasets within our SQL Server and ArcGIS Server environment
Documenting data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic clearly
Key Responsibilities
Design and implement robust ETL/ELT pipelines to extract data from multiple public APIs and load it into blob storage and relational databases
Build and manage scheduled workflows in Apache Airflow, our data orchestration platform
Handle complex API integrations, including authentication flows (OAuth2, API keys), pagination, and rate limiting
Structure data in blob storage (e.g. Azure Blob) for efficient downstream access
Transform and load data into structured SQL databases for analytics and access by web applications
Manage and maintain geospatial (GIS) data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server, ensuring it is accurate and accessible to downstream applications
Implement monitoring, logging, and validation to ensure data integrity and pipeline reliability
Work closely with data scientists and software developers to ensure data availability and usability
Maintain clear documentation for data sources, transformations, and orchestration logic
Qualification and Experience
This is a hands-on, production-focused data engineering role. You will spend your time building and maintaining real pipelines that the business depends on, working directly with code, APIs, and cloud infrastructure rather than through managed, no-code tooling. You do not need a background in our industry. However, candidates looking for a purely analytical or reporting role, or who are not comfortable writing production code and working with version control and the command line, will not be progressed.
Required
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience)
3+ years building data pipelines in a production environment
Strong understanding of ETL/ELT architecture, API data ingestion, and data modeling principles
Hands-on experience with Azure
Experience working with geospatial/GIS data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server
Clear communication, including explaining technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders
A naturally analytical, detail-oriented mindset with a proactive approach to monitoring and data accuracy
Highly Desirable
Experience integrating data from open economic and financial APIs (e.g. World Bank, IMF, OECD, UN Data, FRED)
Familiarity with large structured and semi-structured datasets (JSON, CSV, Parquet) and associated performance considerations
Experience building incremental ingestion or change data capture (CDC) pipelines
An interest in, or exposure to, the resources, commodities, or research data domain
Technical Skills
Languages: Python and SQL (Microsoft T-SQL)
Orchestration: Apache Airflow
Geospatial: GIS data in Microsoft SQL Server and ArcGIS Server
RESTful API integration (authentication, pagination, error handling)
Azure Blob Storage
Familiarity with version control (Git) and CI/CD pipelines
Fluent written and spoken English (essential)
What We Offer
Modern, central office near to public transport and key amenities
Competitive salary
Health Care
Lunch
13 months salary
